error_signature: Unable to sign without access token
title: Raindrop integration missing access token
symptom: When attempting to get bookmarks or collections from Raindrop, n8n returns an error stating 'Unable to sign without access token'.
applies_when: Credentials for Raindrop are set up
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different integration
root_cause: The Raindrop integration requires a valid access token to authenticate requests. If the 'Site' and 'Redirect URI' fields are not properly configured in the Raindrop app settings, the access token cannot be generated, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Open the Raindrop integration app settings
Fill in the 'Site' and 'Redirect URI' fields
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'Site' and 'Redirect URI' fields are filled in the Raindrop app settings and reconnect the integration.
